| native_name = 熊野神社（富山市宮保）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)'''|熊野神社（富山市宮保）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)
| native_name = 熊野神社（富山市宮保）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

| map_caption = Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)'''|熊野神社（富山市宮保）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

| name = Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)
| native_name = 熊野神社（富山市宮保）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)'''|熊野神社（富山市宮保）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)'''|熊野神社（富山市宮保）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kumano Shrine (Miyabo, Toyama City)'''|熊野神社（富山市宮保）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Etchū Province]].
